display_name: RollingAI 风格 H5（粒子地球 · 磨砂玻璃）
$comment_render_entry: Splices deck.json slides[].data.html into the template's <main class="deck">. Each slide MUST be layout=raw — rolling-deck doesn't use structured layouts. The authoring flow is still conversational (copy template.html, hand-fill sections) but this lets the dispatcher render a deck.json into the rolling-deck shell when one already exists (e.g. when admin / scripts go via plugin/_player/render.py).
$comment_layouts: rolling-deck uses raw HTML sections, not structured layouts. Each <section class="slide"> is layout=raw with data.html holding the full section markup. The reference.md component library is the authoring vocabulary (cards-3, hero-stats, goals-grid, etc.) but these are CSS classes not deck.json layouts.
